query: Wegovy real-world study September 2025 cardiovascular outcomes vs tirzepatide risk reduction heart attack stroke death obesity

{"query":"Wegovy real-world study September 2025 cardiovascular outcomes vs tirzepatide risk reduction heart attack stroke death obesity","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1656,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/novo-nordisks-wegovy-cuts-risk-of-heart-attack-stroke-or-death-by-57-compared-to-tirzepatide-in-real-world-study-of-people-with-obesity-and-cardiovascular-disease-302542590.html","title":"Novo Nordisk's Wegovy® cuts risk of heart attack, stroke or death by 57% compared to tirzepatide in real-world study of people with obesity and cardiovascular disease","content":"WEGOVY® (semaglutide) injection 2.4 mg is an injectable prescription medicine used with a reduced calorie diet and increased physical activity.10
Oral presentation presented at the European Society of Cardiology Congress 2025; 29 August–01 September 2025; IFEMA Madrid, Madrid, Spain.
Moderated poster presentation presented at the American College of Cardiology Scientific Session & Expo 2025; 29–31 March 2025; McCormick Place Convention Center, Chicago, US."},{"url":"https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC12890754/","title":"Semaglutide and tirzepatide effects on cardiovascular outcomes in people with overweight or obesity in the real world (STEER) - PMC","content":"To assess the real‐world effectiveness of semaglutide versus tirzepatide in reducing major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE) among patients with overweight/obesity and established atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease (ASCVD) without diabetes in an insured US population.
The study period ranged from 1 January 2016 to 31 January 2025, with a patient identification period from 13 May 2022 to 31 January 2025.
3.9), coronary revascularization (7.6 vs.
The risk of MI was lower by 62% (HR 0.38; 95% CI 0.17, 0.86; p = 0.019) with semaglutide compared with tirzepatide and the risk of hospitalisation for HF was 66% lower (HR 0.34; 95% CI 0.13–0.85; 0.02).
Additionally, although the study cohorts were balanced using propensity‐score matching, the potential for biases or residual confounding from unmeasured variables, such as diet or physical activity, cannot be eliminated."},{"url":"https://www.neurologylive.com/view/real-world-data-points-greater-impact-semaglutide-over-tirzepatide-reducing-heart-attack-stroke-risk","title":"Real-World Data Point to Greater Impact of Semaglutide Over Tirzepatide in Reducing Heart Attack, Stroke Risk | NeurologyLive - Clinical Neurology News and Neurology Expert Insights","content":"When compared with tirzepatide, results revealed a 57% greater risk reduction with semaglutide for heart attack, stroke, and cardiovascular-related death or death from any cause.
Presented at the European Society of Cardiology (ESC) Congress in Madrid, Spain, treatment with semaglutide resulted in a significant 29% lowered risk for heart attack, stroke, and death for treated people, regardless of any gaps in their treatment, when compared with tirzepatide.
Novo Nordisk’s Wegovy® cuts risk of heart attack, stroke or death by 57% compared to tirzepatide in real-world study of people with obesity and cardiovascular disease."},{"url":"https://medicalupdateonline.com/2025/09/wegovy-cuts-risk-of-heart-attack-stroke-or-death-by-57-compared-to-tirzepatide-in-real-world-study-of-people-with-obesity-and-cardiovascular-disease-novo-nordisk/","title":"Wegovy cuts risk of heart attack, stroke or death by 57% compared to tirzepatide in real-world study of people with obesity and cardiovascular disease - Novo Nordisk - Medical Update Online","content":"Novo Nordisk presented data from the STEER real-world study of evidence gathered from actual patient experiences at the European Society of Cardiology (ESC) Congress 2025 in Madrid, Spain.
“Our landmark trial, SELECT, showed that Wegovy is associated with a significant 20% risk reduction of cardiovascular events, backed up with even greater risk reductions in the real-world studies SCORE and STEER."},{"url":"https://www.biospace.com/drug-development/novos-wegovy-cuts-cardio-risk-by-57-versus-tirzepatide","title":"Novo's Wegovy Cuts Cardio Risk by 57% Versus Tirzepatide - BioSpace","content":"Novo Nordisk’s Wegovy more than halved the risk of major adverse cardiovascular events in people with overweight or obesity compared with Eli Lilly’s tirzepatide, continuing a recent winning streak for the blockbuster weight loss drug.
Data from the real-world STEER study, presented Friday at the 2025 European Society of Cardiology Congress, showed that Wegovy treatment resulted in a 57% lower likelihood of heart attack and stroke, as well as cardiovascular death and death from any cause, versus tirzepatide.
According to Anna Windle, senior vice president of Clinical Development, Medical and Regulatory Affairs at Novo, these results suggest that Wegovy stands apart from other therapies in its class."}]}

tavily.raw: {"query":"Wegovy real-world study September 2025 cardiovascular outcomes vs tirzepatide risk reduction heart attack stroke death obesity","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://biopharmaapac.com/news/75/6817/wegovy-demonstrates-superior-cardiovascular-benefit-over-tirzepatide-in-real-world-study.html","title":"Wegovy® Demonstrates Superior Cardiovascular Benefit Over Tirzepatide in Real-World Study","content":"The STEER study investigated the risk of major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE) with Wegovy® (semaglutide) 2.4 mg compared with tirzepatide treatment in people with overweight or obesity and established CVD without diabetes.1. Compared with tirzepatide, Wegovy® showed a significant 57% greater risk reduction for heart attack, stroke and cardiovascular-related death or death from any cause, in people with overweight or obesity and CVD, while on treatment with no treatment gaps more than 30 days. In all treated people, regardless of any gaps in their treatment, Wegovy® showed a significant 29% risk reduction for heart attack, stroke and death from any cause compared with tirzepatide (over an average follow-up of 8.3 months for Wegovy® and 8.6 months for tirzepatide). Additionally, in all treated people, regardless of any gaps in their treatment, people treated with Wegovy® experienced fewer events of heart attack, stroke and cardiovascular-related death than people treated with tirzepatide.1.","score":0.9006087,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/novo-nordisks-wegovy-cuts-risk-of-heart-attack-stroke-or-death-by-57-compared-to-tirzepatide-in-real-world-study-of-people-with-obesity-and-cardiovascular-disease-302542590.html","title":"Novo Nordisk's Wegovy® cuts risk of heart attack, stroke or death by 57% compared to tirzepatide in real-world study of people with obesity and cardiovascular disease","content":"## News Releases Overview. ## View All Auto & Transportation. ## Business Technology Overview. ## View All Business Technology. ## View All General Business. ## Consumer Technology Overview. ## View All Consumer Technology. # Novo Nordisk's Wegovy® cuts risk of heart attack, stroke or death by 57% compared to tirzepatide in real-world study of people with obesity and cardiovascular disease. The STEER study investigated the risk of major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE) with Wegovy® (semaglutide) 2.4 mg compared with tirzepatide treatment in people with overweight or obesity and established CVD without diabetes.1. In all treated people, regardless of any gaps in their treatment, Wegovy® showed a significant 29% risk reduction for heart attack, stroke and death from any cause compared with tirzepatide (over an average follow-up of 8.3 months for Wegovy® and 8.6 months for tirzepatide).","score":0.8921218,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://medicalupdateonline.com/2025/09/wegovy-cuts-risk-of-heart-attack-stroke-or-death-by-57-compared-to-tirzepatide-in-real-world-study-of-people-with-obesity-and-cardiovascular-disease-novo-nordisk","title":"Wegovy cuts risk of heart attack, stroke or death by 57% ...","content":"Sep 6, 2025 — Compared with tirzepatide, Wegovy showed a significant 57% greater risk reduction for heart attack, stroke and cardiovascular-related death or ...Read more","score":0.8539252,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.epocrates.com/online/article/esc-2025-semaglutide-outperformed-tirzepatide-in-real-world-cardiovascular","title":"ESC 2025: Semaglutide outperformed tirzepatide in real- ...","content":"Sep 8, 2025 — Novo Nordisk's Wegovy® cuts risk of heart attack, stroke or death by 57% compared to tirzepatide in real-world study of people with obesity and","score":0.8524574,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.drugtopics.com/view/wegovy-outperforms-tirzepatide-in-reducing-major-adverse-cardiovascular-events","title":"Wegovy Outperforms Tirzepatide in Reducing Major ...","content":"Sep 2, 2025 — A real-world study found that semaglutide significantly reduced the risk of major cardiovascular events compared to tirzepatide.","score":0.84277284,"raw_content":null}],"response_time":2.34,"request_id":"d1a84100-ee05-4cc7-be7e-1e0a38291b28"}
